raw_text:

{
  "claims": [
    "California is facing a $12 billion dollar deficit.",
    "The federal economic policies create uncertainty in state, federal, and global markets.",
    "Increased animal disease outbreaks like Avian Influenza have severe financial impacts on poultry and egg farmers.",
    "The Department of Food and Agriculture's budget has been increased by $6 million to respond to threats to animal and human health.",
    "The Delta Conveyance Project aims to reliably deliver water to farms, homes, and businesses.",
    "Streamlining the Delta Conveyance Project will save time and reduce costs.",
    "The May Revise proposes $1 billion annually to build the High Speed Rail system.",
    "High Speed Rail is expected to bring economic mobility and clean transportation to California.",
    "The May Revision proposes a total funding of $45.7 billion for the Higher Education segments."
  ]
